result: {"schema_version": 1, "pass": false, "review_status": "completed", "summary": "移除 context manager 造成 file handle 洩漏，移除 try/except 使單一壞檔案可摧毀整批處理", "issues": [{"severity": "critical", "confidence": "high", "category": "correctness", "file": "pipeline/ingest.py", "line_hint": "L18", "check": "`f = open(...)` 在迴圈內開啟檔案，無 `with` 也無 `f.close()`", "verdict": "每次迭代都洩漏一個 file descriptor；批量大時將觸發 OS 層級 too many open files 錯誤", "fix": "恢復 `with open(...) as f:` context manager"}, {"severity": "major", "confidence": "high", "category": "correctness", "file": "pipeline/ingest.py", "line_hint": "L18-L20", "check": "原本 try/except 捕捉 IOError 與 json.JSONDecodeError 並 skip 壞檔案的邏輯被整段刪除", "verdict": "任何一個檔案無法讀取或非合法 JSON，整個 `process_batch` 直接拋例外中斷，已處理的 results 全部丟失", "fix": "恢復 try/except 區塊，或至少在外層有對應的錯誤處理策略"}]}
